tasks.title: Setup Core Project Structure
tasks.description: Create the simplified 40-file architecture structure with organized directories and core entry points
tasks.details: Create new directory structure: src/commands/ (8 files), src/registry/ (8 files), src/docs/ (6 files), src/core/ (12 files), src/types/ (4 files), src/utils/ (6 files). Create entry points: cli.ts, server.ts, index.ts. Set up TypeScript configuration and build system. Initialize package.json with proper dependencies including commander.js.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify directory structure exists, entry points compile successfully, and TypeScript configuration is valid. Test that build process generates expected output.

subtasks.title: Create workspace configuration and package structure
subtasks.description: Set up monorepo workspace configuration with proper package.json structure, workspace definitions, and package boundaries
subtasks.details:
Configure root package.json with workspaces, create individual package directories, establish package naming conventions, and set up shared dependencies management
<info added on 2025-07-05T04:53:18.969Z>
Create directory structure for src-v2 with organized folders: commands/ for CLI command implementations, registry/ for component registry management, docs/ for documentation generation, core/ for fundamental CLI functionality, types/ for TypeScript definitions, and utils/ for shared utility functions. Ensure proper separation of concerns and clear module boundaries between each directory.
</info added on 2025-07-05T04:53:18.969Z>

subtasks.title: Configure TypeScript monorepo setup with path mapping
subtasks.description: Implement TypeScript configuration with proper module resolution, path mapping, and cross-package type definitions
subtasks.details: Create root tsconfig.json with path mapping, individual package tsconfig files, establish type definitions structure, and configure module resolution for cross-package imports

subtasks.title: Set up linting and formatting configuration
subtasks.description: Configure ESLint, Prettier, and other code quality tools with shared configurations across all packages
subtasks.details: Create shared ESLint config, Prettier configuration, set up pre-commit hooks, configure VS Code settings, and establish code quality standards

subtasks.title: Implement testing framework setup
subtasks.description: Configure Jest/Vitest testing framework with proper test utilities, coverage reporting, and cross-package test support
subtasks.details: Set up test framework configuration, create test utilities and helpers, configure coverage reporting, establish testing patterns, and set up test scripts

subtasks.title: Configure build tooling and scripts
subtasks.description: Set up build system with proper compilation order, bundling, and distribution preparation
subtasks.details: Configure build tools (tsc, rollup, webpack), create build scripts with proper dependency order, set up watch mode, and configure distribution packaging

subtasks.title: Create development workflow and CI/CD integration
subtasks.description: Establish development scripts, CI/CD pipeline configuration, and deployment workflows for the monorepo
subtasks.details: Create development scripts for running packages, set up CI/CD configuration, configure automated testing and deployment, and establish release workflow

tasks.title: Consolidate Type System
tasks.description: Merge 100+ interfaces into ~10 essential TypeScript types for components, registry, and CLI operations
tasks.details: Create consolidated types in src/types/: ComponentMetadata, RegistryConfig, CLIOptions, DocumentationConfig. Remove redundant interfaces and abstract base classes. Define core types for component publishing, versioning, and dependency resolution. Use TypeScript utility types for DRY principle.
tasks.testStrategy: Ensure all type definitions compile without errors. Verify type coverage across codebase. Test that existing functionality maintains type safety with new consolidated types.

tasks.title: Implement Simplified HTTP Client
tasks.description: Replace complex HTTPClient with fetch-based solution and simple retry mechanism
tasks.details: Create HTTPClient class in src/core/ using native fetch API. Implement exponential backoff retry logic (3 attempts). Add request/response logging, timeout handling, and error parsing. Remove circuit breaker pattern and complex abstraction layers. Support JSON/form-data requests for registry API.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for retry logic, timeout handling, and error scenarios. Integration tests with mock registry API endpoints. Verify performance improvements over existing implementation.

tasks.title: Refactor Command Structure
tasks.description: Remove BaseCommand abstraction and implement direct commander.js commands for all CLI operations
tasks.details: Create 8 command files in src/commands/: add.ts, remove.ts, update.ts, publish.ts, create.ts, import.ts, search.ts, docs.ts. Use commander.js directly without abstraction layers. Implement progress indicators, colorful output, and error recovery. Add dry-run mode and caching mechanisms.
tasks.testStrategy: Test each command individually with various parameter combinations. Verify progress indicators work correctly. Test error recovery and dry-run functionality. Ensure commands integrate properly with registry system.

tasks.title: Build Registry API System
tasks.description: Create REST API endpoints for component metadata, publishing, versioning, and search functionality
tasks.details: Implement registry server in src/server.ts with endpoints: GET /components, POST /components, GET /search, GET /analytics. Use Express.js with TypeScript. Implement semantic versioning, dependency resolution, and conflict handling. Add authentication for private registries. Include offline sync capabilities with local mirror.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for all API endpoints. Integration tests for component publishing workflow. Test version management and dependency resolution. Verify authentication and private registry functionality.

tasks.title: Implement Component Management Core
tasks.description: Build core functionality for installing, updating, and removing components with dependency resolution
tasks.details: Create core component management in src/core/: ComponentInstaller, DependencyResolver, PackageManager. Auto-detect frameworks (Next.js, Vite, Remix). Implement bulk import functionality. Add component caching and update mechanisms. Handle file operations with proper error recovery.
tasks.testStrategy: Test component installation across different frameworks. Verify dependency resolution with various scenarios. Test bulk import and update operations. Ensure caching works correctly and improves performance.

tasks.title: Create AST Parser for Documentation
tasks.description: Build AST parser to extract component metadata, JSDoc comments, and TypeScript types for documentation generation
tasks.details: Create AST parser in src/docs/ using TypeScript compiler API. Extract component props, methods, JSDoc comments, and type definitions. Parse React components for story generation. Create markdown documentation from extracted metadata. Generate API documentation from TypeScript types.
tasks.testStrategy: Test parser with various React component patterns. Verify JSDoc extraction accuracy. Test TypeScript type parsing for complex interfaces. Ensure generated documentation matches component reality.

tasks.title: Implement Storybook Auto-Generation
tasks.description: Create system to automatically generate Storybook stories from component analysis and metadata
tasks.details: Build Storybook generator in src/docs/: StoryGenerator, ComponentAnalyzer, StoryTemplates. Create story templates for different component types. Generate interactive previews with prop controls. Implement component playground functionality. Support multiple Storybook configurations.
tasks.testStrategy: Test story generation with various component types. Verify generated stories load correctly in Storybook. Test interactive controls and component playground. Ensure stories accurately represent component behavior.

tasks.title: Add Search and Analytics System
tasks.description: Implement full-text search with filtering and analytics tracking for component usage and popularity
tasks.details: Create search system in src/registry/: SearchEngine, FilterManager, AnalyticsTracker. Implement full-text search with fuzzy matching. Add filtering by category, framework, popularity. Track component downloads, usage patterns, and popularity metrics. Create analytics dashboard endpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: Test search accuracy with various queries. Verify filtering works correctly. Test analytics data collection and reporting. Ensure search performance is acceptable with large component datasets.

tasks.title: Integrate All Systems and Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Connect all components, optimize performance through caching and parallelization, and finalize CLI integration
tasks.details: Integrate registry, documentation, and component management systems. Implement caching layer for registry data and component metadata. Add parallelization for bulk operations. Optimize command execution times. Create comprehensive error handling and recovery mechanisms. Generate TypeScript types for installed components.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end testing of complete workflows. Performance benchmarking against current implementation. Test error scenarios and recovery mechanisms. Verify all commands work together seamlessly. Load testing with large component sets.
